task: Nightly learning sentry — failure attribution and condition effectiveness
local_output: Run nightly sentry analysis on 4 trades
opus_correction: 4 trades | 1W/3L | 25% WR | -19.0 pips. Stale watch failure (67%): 2/3 losses from watches with stale_flagged_at set but not enforced. BB width unit correction: values in price units not pips — after conversion 9-14 pips (not dead market). bb_expanding 0% WR (0/3). finding_id NULL on 100% — watch-to-trade linkage broken. Top recs: hard-block stale watches, fix finding_id propagation, investigate bb_expanding.
opus_reasoning: Step 1: Collected trade data with full indicator snapshots. Step 2: Discovered finding_id NULL on all trades — proximity fallback only. Step 3: Attributed 67% failures to stale watches, 33% weak conditions. Step 4: BB width unit error caught — price units vs pips changes entire analysis. Step 5: bb_expanding 0% WR is strongest negative signal. Step 6: RSI extremes (32.4 winner vs 48.0 loser avg) suggest better filter.

task: Trade audit — 7 fixes across 5 files for fan data, momentum, and guardian retracement
local_output: Audit trades and fix identified issues in trading pipeline
opus_correction: 7 fixes across 5 files: (1) watch_manager H1→M15 for market picture, (2) hard block on None mkt_picture, (3) ema_separation removed broken fan_direction override dropping strong_bull/bear to neutral, (4) trading_cycle fan data re-fetch + block in snipe_direct, (5) against-momentum gate blocking sells into strength, (6) guardian time escalation removed entirely, (7) extended retrace suppression with retracing+continuing+5min cooldown states. Defense-in-depth: retracement check at trading_api_routes auto-close (threat>=75).
opus_reasoning: First traced fan data empty path through watch_manager — wrong timeframe (H1 vs M15). Then found silent None passthrough. Third, ema_separation was defeating fan signal by overriding strong directions to neutral. Fourth, snipe_direct never re-fetched fan data. Fifth, trade 2669 sold at stoch=70 — needed momentum gate. Sixth, guardian time escalation was killing valid trades purely based on age. Seventh, trades 2717/2785 killed immediately after retracement exit — needed extended suppression window. All files syntax-checked clean.
